relations.subject: Black-headed tailorbird
relations.evidence: It inhabits dense undergrowth in lowland forests at elevations of up to and is non-migratory. A 2021 study of avian biodiversity near Mount Pantaron in Bukidnon found that the black-headed tailorbird, like other Philippine endemics, was absent from agricultural ecosystems but present in nearby montane forests

relations.subject: Black-headed tailorbird
relations.evidence: It inhabits the Mindanao and the Eastern Visayas Endemic Bird Area; no threats to the species are known
